Access and modify herald_submission properties

Source: R/sub-class.R
herald_submission-methods.Rd

S3 methods for $, $<-, [[, and print on herald_submission objects. $ provides derived views (xpt_files, json_files, define_path, report_paths) in addition to the raw S7 properties.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'herald_submission'
x$name

# S3 method for class 'herald_submission'
x$name <- value

# S3 method for class 'herald_submission'
x[[i, ...]]

# S3 method for class 'herald_submission'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A herald_submission object.

name

Property name.

value

Replacement value.

i

Index (character).

...

Passed to underlying methods.

Value

$ returns the property value or a derived field. $<- returns the modified object. [[ returns the property value. print returns x invisibly.

See also

Other methods: print.herald_define(), print.herald_dict_provider(), print.herald_result(), print.herald_spec(), summary.herald_result()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# `sub` is a herald_submission produced by an internal builder.
# Once obtained, use `$` to read raw S7 properties or derived views:

sub$output_dir       # raw S7 property
sub$herald_version
sub$timestamp

sub$xpt_files        # derived: character vector of XPT paths
sub$json_files       # derived: character vector of JSON paths
sub$define_path      # derived: single path or NULL
sub$report_paths     # derived: HTML / XLSX report paths

sub[["xpt_files"]]   # `[[` works identically to `$`

sub$files            # raw files table: path, type, size
} # }
